root_causes.photo_browser: The previous category helper overwrote the script that defined window.ehmPostAdImagePicker, so the React Add Photo button called a missing function.
root_causes.city: The category/location helper only activated on /post-ad, but the React route is /post.
root_causes.ad_phone_otp: The previous multiple-phone OTP implementation was connected only to the fallback post-ad.html page, not the live React /post page.
root_causes.fake_publish: The React Post Ad handler only changed local component state to a success screen and never inserted an ad.
root_causes.dashboard: The React dashboard displays Ht.slice(0,3), a hard-coded sample list, instead of the signed-in user's ads.
root_causes.password_reset: otp-client.js declared a global lexical const but did not assign it to window.EHM_OTP, while the reset page called window.EHM_OTP.request.

/api/publish-ad.message: Log in before publishing an ad.

/api/my-ads.message: Log in to view your ads.
